basic_details.job_title: PM SHRI School Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 15 Lab Attendant, Caretaker and More
basic_details.organization_name: PM SHRI School Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya
basic_details.short_information: PM SHRI School Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya Recruitment 2026: PM SHRI School Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya is conducting a Walk-in Interview for 15 Various Teaching and Support posts. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for eligible candidates to attend the interview directly without any prior online application.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 50 years Age relaxation details are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: B. PEd or M. PEd with specialisation in Football/Volleyball/Table Tennis/ Archery, Certificate/Diploma/Degree in Classical/Folk/Modern Dance/Local/Traditional Dance, Certificate/ Diploma/ Degree in Music with professional experience, Minimum Class 12th or Equivalent, Minimum Class X, Diploma in Computer Science/ Information Technology OR BCA/B.Sc. IT OR PGDCA OR DOEACC 'A' Level, B.E./B.Tech. in Electronics & Communication engineering with experience in Innovation/Robotics/STEM/AI, Any graduate with PG Diploma in Yoga or M.PEd with Yoga specialisation, Female graduate with experience in Judo/Karate self-defence coaching, 10th Class pass with certificate/Diploma in laboratory Technique OR 12th class with science stream
qualification.details: Sports Coach- (for Football/Volleyball/ Table Tennis/ Archery): B. PEd or M. PEd with specialisation in Football/Volleyball/Table Tennis/ Archery from a recognised university. Dance coach (for Odissi/Kathak/Bharat-Natyam/ Kuchipudi/ folk/ Modern dance/local/ traditional): Certificate/Diploma/Degree in Classical/Folk/Modern Dance/Local/Traditional Dance, with performance experience, etc. Specialised in Odissi/Kathak Dance/Bharatanatyam/Kuchipudi, priority will be given based on experience. Instrumental Music coach (for Classical- Guitar, Keyboard, Congo, Flute, Harmonium, etc.): Skilled in instruments like Guitar, Tabla, Keyboard, Congo, Flute, Octopad, etc., Certificate/ Diploma/ Degree in Music with professional experience, etc. Priority will be given on the basis of experience. Caretaker: Minimum Class 12th or Equivalent, and preference shall, however, be given to graduates and those having a background of working in the students' hostel of residential schools. Matron: Minimum Class X; however, a higher educational qualification may be given preference in engagement. The age should be between 35 and 55 years, and the females should not be married, including widows or divorcees without encumbrances. Skill teacher for Artificial Intelligence (AI): Diploma in Computer Science/ Information Technology OR Bachelor's Degree in Computer Application/ Science/Information Technology (BCA, B.Sc. Computer Science/Information Technology) OR Graduation with PGDCA OR DOEACC 'A' Level Certificate. Atal Tinkering Lab Facilitator: B.E./B.Tech. in Electronics & Communication engineering, with a minimum of one year of experience in a reputed institution in the field of Innovation, Robotics, STEM, Artificial Intelligence, etc. Yoga Teacher (preference will be given to females): Any graduate with a PG Diploma in Yoga or an M. Ped with Yoga specialisation from a recognised university. Trainer for Girls of Self-Defence (Female): A female graduate with experience in coaching self-defence & an expert in Judo/ Karate (Relevant degree/ certificate from a recognised institute). Lab Attendant: 10th Class pass with a certificate/Diploma in laboratory Technique OR 12th class with science stream from a recognized Board/University.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Sports Coach- (for Football/Volleyball/ Table Tennis/ Archery)
Dance coach (for Odissi/Kathak/Bharat-Natyam/ Kuchipudi/ folk/ Modern dance/local/ traditional)
Instrumental Music coach (for Classical- Guitar, Keyboard, Congo, Flute, Harmonium, etc.)
Yoga Teacher (preference will be given to females)

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 1,250/- Per Session, Rs. 25,000/- Per month, Rs. 30,000/- Per Month, On a Daily wage basis (unskilled rate), On a Daily wage basis (semi-skilled rate), Rs. 12,500/- Per Month
salary_details.details: Sports Coach- (for Football/Volleyball/ Table Tennis/ Archery): Rs. 1,250/- Per Session Dance coach (for Odissi/Kathak/Bharat-Natyam/ Kuchipudi/ folk/ Modern dance/local/ traditional): Rs. 25,000/- Per month Instrumental Music coach (for Classical- Guitar, Keyboard, Congo, Flute, Harmonium, etc.): Rs. 25,000/- Per month Caretaker: On a Daily wage basis (unskilled rate) Matron: On a Daily wage basis (unskilled rate) Skill teacher for Artificial Intelligence (AI): Rs. 30,000/- Per Month Atal Tinkering Lab Facilitator: Rs. 30,000/- Per Month Yoga Teacher (preference will be given to females): Rs. 12,500/- Per Month Trainer for Girls of Self-Defence (Female): Rs. 12,500/- Per Month Lab Attendant: On a Daily wage basis (semi-skilled rate)

all_official_links.label: Download PM SHRI School Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies announced by PM SHRI School Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya?
faq.answer: PM SHRI School Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya has announced a total of 15 vacancies for various teaching and support posts. These positions are available on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q2. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Interested candidates can attend the interview directly at the specified venue and time without prior online application.

faq.question: Q3. What are the important dates for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for email submission of biodata is 26 June 2026. The walk-in interview dates are 29 June 2026 for posts Sl. No. 01 to 05, and 30 June 2026 for posts Sl. No. 06 to 10.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the candidates applying for these posts?
faq.answer: The age limit for all posts is between a minimum of 21 years and a maximum of 50 years. Specific age criteria might apply to certain posts like Caretaker and Matron.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for the posts?
faq.answer: Educational qualifications vary significantly by post, ranging from Class X and XII pass to specialized degrees like B.Ed., M.Ed., BCA, B.Tech., and diplomas in various fields like dance, music, and IT.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary structure for the selected candidates?
faq.answer: The salary varies per post. Some positions are paid on a daily wage basis, while others offer monthly stipends ranging from Rs. 12,500/- to Rs. 30,000/- per month, and some coaches are paid per session.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at PM SHRI School Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya, Phulbani, Odisha. The exact venue details should be confirmed from the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if applicable), and category certificates, along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts will be based on a Walk-in Interview. Candidates are advised to be prepared for the interview and reach the venue on time.
